name: Robert Mitchum
abstract: Robert Charles Durman Mitchum (August 6, 1917 – July 1, 1997) was an American actor and singer. He is known for his antihero roles and film noir appearances.

about_quotes.speaker: Bill Coleman
about_quotes.evidence: She was a vivacious girl who liked to dance and had a crush for the trombonist who looked like Robert Mitchum.

about_quotes.speaker: Tommy Ridgley
about_quotes.evidence: No, I heard. Oh, yeah. Robert Mitchum came when he was in town. And he wound up at the Dewdrop.

about_quotes.speaker: Jack Sheldon
about_quotes.evidence: I remember Robert Mitchum was in it with Lila Leeds, getting busted.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jack Sheldon interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, February 15, 1999
